tool.name: EnzyWizard Interaction

param.name: hbond_da_max_distance
param.label: H-bond donor-acceptor max distance
param.help: Maximum donor-acceptor distance cutoff for hydrogen bond detection. Default: 3.9

param.name: hbond_ha_max_distance
param.label: H-bond hydrogen-acceptor max distance
param.help: Maximum hydrogen-acceptor distance cutoff for hydrogen bond detection. Default: 2.5

param.name: hbond_angle
param.label: H-bond angle cutoff
param.help: Minimum donor-hydrogen-acceptor angle cutoff in degrees. Default: 90.0

param.name: ionic_distance_cutoff
param.label: Ionic bond distance cutoff
param.help: Maximum distance cutoff for ionic bond detection. Default: 4.0

param.name: ppstack_center_distance_cutoff
param.label: Pi-pi stacking center distance cutoff
param.help: Maximum aromatic ring-center distance cutoff. Default: 6.5

param.name: pication_angle_cutoff
param.label: Pi-cation angle cutoff
param.help: Maximum angle cutoff in degrees. Default: 45.0

tool.help:
**EnzyWizard-Interaction**
Calculates protein/protein-substrate molecular interactions, detecting hydrogen bonds, ionic bonds, van der Waals contacts, pi-pi stacking, pi-cation interactions, and disulfide bonds.
**Inputs** - Cleaned protein structure in CIF or PDB format. - Optional substrate names and directory.
**Outputs** - JSON report with interaction records and statistics.
For more information, see the `enzywizard-interaction` documentation: https://github.com/bioinfbrad/enzywizard-interaction
